utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I can not believe her , you know it is just ... it is so typical .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Now Monica , I know you are upset , but do not forget .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: There is going to be a wedding , you are going to throw the bouquet , and then there’s going to be a honeymoon , maybe in Paris .

emotion_cause.span: 3_There is going to be a wedding , you are going to throw the bouquet , and then there’s going to be a honeymoon , maybe in Paris .
3_there’s going to be a honeymoon , maybe in Paris .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: We will take a moonlit walk on the Rue de la .

emotion_cause.span: 5_We will take a moonlit walk on the Rue de la .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Then we will sprinkle rose pedals on the bed and make love . Not just because it is romantic , but because I can !
